# Full Article: The Chip-Stock Slide Isn't Over. The AI Trade Is Still Under Pressure. But 'No One Is Short'

**Author:** Kara Greenberg  
**Published:** July 16, 2026, 11:43 AM EDT  
**Source:** Investopedia

---

## Key Takeaways

- Chip stocks slid Thursday, extending a tough few weeks for the sector and the broader AI trade.
- Some experts have suggested a pullback could be healthy after a torrid rally earlier this year.

---

## Article Body

The chips are down today. Shares of major chipmakers plunged Thursday, extending what's been a rough stretch for the AI trade that has come despite a string of solid earnings reports.

### 🟢 Catalyst #2: TSMC Arizona Investment
$100B additional investment bringing total to **$265 billion** for 2nm mass production and advanced packaging for U.S. customers ([cnbc.com](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/07/16/tsmc-second-quarter-profit-.html)).
